instagramUrl.title: Instagram URL
instagramUrl.description: A reel, post, or carousel URL (/reel/, /reels/, /p/, or /tv/).

cookies.title: Instagram cookies (optional override)
cookies.description: Netscape-format cookies.txt content for a logged-in Instagram account. Leave blank to use the IG_COOKIES Actor environment variable set once in Actor settings — that's the recommended path so you never paste cookies per run.

whisperModel.title: Whisper model
whisperModel.description: faster-whisper model size for reel transcription.
